name: Undersea Kingdom
quote: "In faerie, you can die of a transition."
description: The cold, vast aquatic domain ruled by Queen Orlagh. Cruel, deep, and constantly plotting to pull the land under.
history: The vast ocean kingdom surrounding the islands of Elfhame, ruled by Queen Orlagh. Its deep trenches hold ancient sea monsters, shimmering kelp forests, and coral palaces, locked in a tense political standoff with the land court.
events: The treaty negotiations where Princess Nicasia was offered in marriage.
The kidnapping of High King Cardan to the Undersea by sea raiders.
secrets: Queen Orlagh is vulnerable to cold-iron spears.
Nicasia's sapphire necklace contains captured sea storm wind.
